data.title: ElevenLabs Audio
data.notes: Generate speech, sound effects, music, voice conversions, isolated vocals, and speech transcripts using the ElevenLabs API.

tools.title: Text to Speech
tools.description: Generate spoken audio from text and attach the output file to the job.

fields.title: Text
fields.caption: Enter the text to synthesize.

fields.title: Voice ID
fields.caption: ElevenLabs voice ID to use for speech generation. See [Default Voices](https://elevenlabs.io/app/default-voices), click the ellipsis menu, then click "Copy Voice ID".

fields.title: Model ID
fields.caption: ElevenLabs TTS model ID. [Model List](https://elevenlabs.io/docs/overview/models#models-overview).

fields.title: Output Format
fields.caption: Audio format requested from ElevenLabs. Some sample rates and bit rates require higher tier accounts (Pro or Creator).

fields.title: Stability
fields.caption: Optional voice stability value from 0 to 1.

fields.title: Similarity Boost
fields.caption: Optional voice similarity boost from 0 to 1.

fields.title: Style
fields.caption: Optional style exaggeration value from 0 to 1.

fields.title: Speed
fields.caption: Optional speaking speed multiplier.

fields.title: Speaker Boost
fields.caption: Enable ElevenLabs speaker boost in voice settings.

fields.title: Language Code
fields.caption: Optional ISO language code.

fields.title: Seed
fields.caption: Optional seed for more consistent generation.

fields.title: Custom JSON
fields.caption: Optional JSON object merged into the ElevenLabs request body.

fields.title: Timeout (ms)
fields.caption: Number of milliseconds to wait for the request.

tools.title: Sound Effects
tools.description: Generate one or more sound effects from a text prompt.

fields.title: Prompt
fields.caption: Describe the sound effect to generate.
fields.value: A cinematic whoosh with sparkling magic dust.

fields.title: Model ID
fields.caption: ElevenLabs sound effects model ID. [Model List](https://elevenlabs.io/docs/overview/models#models-overview).

fields.title: Duration Seconds
fields.caption: Optional generated audio duration in seconds.

fields.title: Prompt Influence
fields.caption: Optional prompt influence value from 0 to 1.

fields.title: Loop
fields.caption: Ask ElevenLabs for a loopable result when supported.

fields.title: Count
fields.caption: How many sound effects to generate.

fields.title: Output Format
fields.caption: Audio format requested from ElevenLabs. Some sample rates and bit rates require higher tier accounts (Pro or Creator).

fields.title: Custom JSON
fields.caption: Optional JSON object merged into the ElevenLabs request body.

fields.title: Timeout (ms)
fields.caption: Number of milliseconds to wait for each request.

tools.title: Voice Isolator
tools.description: Remove background noise from an input audio file and attach the cleaned output.

fields.title: Input File
fields.caption: Optional input file glob. Leave blank to use the first job input file.

fields.title: File Format
fields.caption: Input file format hint for ElevenLabs.
fields.value: mp3, wav, other, pcm_s16le_16, pcm_s16le_24, pcm_s16le_44_1, pcm_s16le_48, ulaw_8

fields.title: Timeout (ms)
fields.caption: Number of milliseconds to wait for the request.

tools.title: Voice Changer
tools.description: Convert an input speech file into a selected ElevenLabs voice.

fields.title: Input File
fields.caption: Optional input file glob. Leave blank to use the first job input file.

fields.title: Voice ID
fields.caption: ElevenLabs voice ID to convert the speech into. See [Default Voices](https://elevenlabs.io/app/default-voices), click the ellipsis menu, then click "Copy Voice ID".

fields.title: Model ID
fields.caption: ElevenLabs speech-to-speech model ID. [Model List](https://elevenlabs.io/docs/overview/models#models-overview).

fields.title: Output Format
fields.caption: Audio format requested from ElevenLabs. Some sample rates and bit rates require higher tier accounts (Pro or Creator).

fields.title: File Format
fields.caption: Input file format hint for ElevenLabs.
fields.value: mp3, wav, other, pcm_s16le_16, pcm_s16le_24, pcm_s16le_44_1, pcm_s16le_48, ulaw_8

fields.title: Remove Noise
fields.caption: Ask ElevenLabs to remove background noise before voice conversion.

fields.title: Voice Settings
fields.caption: Optional ElevenLabs voice settings JSON.

fields.title: Timeout (ms)
fields.caption: Number of milliseconds to wait for the request.

tools.title: Music
tools.description: Generate music from a text prompt and attach the audio file to the job.

fields.title: Prompt
fields.caption: Describe the music to generate.
fields.value: Upbeat synthwave instrumental with warm analog bass and bright arpeggios.

fields.title: Model ID
fields.caption: ElevenLabs music model ID. [Model List](https://elevenlabs.io/docs/overview/models#models-overview).

fields.title: Length (ms)
fields.caption: Optional song length in milliseconds.

fields.title: Instrumental
fields.caption: Guarantee an instrumental output when supported.

fields.title: Output Format
fields.caption: Audio format requested from ElevenLabs. Some sample rates and bit rates require higher tier accounts (Pro or Creator).

fields.title: Custom JSON
fields.caption: Optional JSON object merged into the ElevenLabs request body.

fields.title: Timeout (ms)
fields.caption: Number of milliseconds to wait for the request.

tools.title: Speech to Text
tools.description: Transcribe an input audio file and return text plus transcript JSON in job data.

fields.title: Input File
fields.caption: Optional input file glob. Leave blank to use the first job input file.

fields.title: Model ID
fields.caption: ElevenLabs speech-to-text model ID. [Model List](https://elevenlabs.io/docs/overview/models#models-overview).

fields.title: Language Code
fields.caption: Optional ISO language code.

fields.title: Audio Events
fields.caption: Tag non-speech audio events in the transcript.

fields.title: Timestamps
fields.caption: Timestamp granularity returned by ElevenLabs.

fields.title: Diarize
fields.caption: Attempt to identify different speakers.

fields.title: Speakers
fields.caption: Optional expected speaker count.

fields.title: Key Terms
fields.caption: Optional comma-separated or newline-separated terms to help recognition.

fields.title: File Format
fields.caption: Input file format hint for ElevenLabs.
fields.value: mp3, wav, other, pcm_s16le_16, pcm_s16le_24, pcm_s16le_44_1, pcm_s16le_48, ulaw_8

fields.title: Custom JSON
fields.caption: Optional extra multipart fields for ElevenLabs speech-to-text.

fields.title: Timeout (ms)
fields.caption: Number of milliseconds to wait for the request.
